title: Optimally Optimized (OLD)
description:
WARNING: THIS MODPACK IS NOW OUTDATED BECAUSE IT WAS MADE FOR THE PRISON COMMUNITY BACK IN 2023

A mixture of Optimizing Mods made to make the game optimized and ready for content
body:
Ever wanted to optimize minecraft a lot?, Ever wanted to have a modpack that's ready for content? Me to!
The Optimally Optimized modpack aims to make minecraft ASAP (as smooth as possible :P) with being ready for any type of content! Highly cinematic videos? SMP videos where you need a voicechat? Normal content?. Optimally optimized has you covered!
